meta.title: Lanjut: Free, local-first ATS resume builder
meta.description: Lanjut is a free, open-source resume builder that stays entirely in your browser; no account, nothing uploaded. Style it freely; every export is structured to sail through applicant tracking systems.

hero.description: Lanjut is a local-first resume builder that stays entirely in your browser. No account, nothing uploaded. Style it freely, and every export is structured to sail through applicant tracking systems.

previewEditor.heading: A fine-grained editor
previewEditor.description: Build your ATS-safe resume in a focused editor. No AI slop, no overwhelming features. Straight to the point, without wasting your time.
previewEditor.caption: Lanjut's ATS Resume Editor

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subheading: The same resume at every stage: what you type, what recruiters see, and what the parser reads back.
howItWorks.step1Description: Start from a template you like. Each one only changes typography, spacing, and accents; the structure underneath stays ATS-safe.
howItWorks.step2Description: Fill structured sections: experience, education, skills. Every change lands in your browser's storage and nowhere else.
howItWorks.step3Description: Download PDF, DOCX, or plain text, and any extractor reads it back in the order you wrote it. That's the whole trick.
howItWorks.screenshotTemplatesAlt: The Lanjut template gallery showing the same resume in different typographic styles
howItWorks.screenshotEditorAlt: The Lanjut editor with a resume preview beside structured sections

closure.heading: Lanjut. Resume. Résumé.
closure.description: The name is the pitch: lanjut means continue. Pick a template or start from a blank page; either way it's free, open source, and your resume never leaves your browser.

footer.tagline: Local-first: your resume never leaves your browser.

nav.menuDescription: Browse Lanjut and jump into the resume builder.

welcome.title: Welcome to Lanjut
welcome.content: A free, local-first resume builder. Everything you write stays in this browser; nothing is ever sent to a server.

create.title: Create a resume
create.content: Start a new resume from here. You can keep as many as you like.

search.title: Find it later
search.content: Search your library by title once it grows.

nav.title: Get around
nav.content: Switch between your dashboard and the template gallery from here.

resumes.title: Your resumes
resumes.content: Every resume you create shows up here; pick one to jump into the editor.

replay.title: Replay anytime
replay.content: Rerun the guide for whichever page you are on with this button.

browse.title: Browse templates
browse.content: Templates change presentation only: typography, spacing, accents. The structure stays linear so ATS parsers can always read your resume.

search.title: Search
search.content: Look up a template by name.

sort.title: Sort
sort.content: Order the gallery by name or by newest.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.content: This paper is your resume exactly as it will export. It updates as you type and is saved to this browser automatically.

sections.title: Fill in your details
sections.content: Each section maps to a fixed, ATS-parseable structure. Work top to bottom.

document.title: Document
document.content: Export your resume, switch its language, or import from a PDF, all from the Document tab.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.content: This paper is your resume exactly as it will export. It updates as you type and is saved to this browser automatically.

edit.title: Fill in your details
edit.content: Tap Edit to open the section forms. Each section maps to a fixed, ATS-parseable structure.

0_10_0.title: Feedback without a GitHub account
0_10_0.description: Report a bug or request a feature right from the app; we file the GitHub issue for you under the name you provide, guarded by a quick verification.

0_10_0.title: JSON and YAML export and import
0_10_0.description: Copy or download your resume as JSON or YAML, and import either back losslessly. Rich text travels as simple markdown.

0_9_0.title: Import from PDF
0_9_0.description: Start a new resume from an existing PDF. Lanjut reads it in your browser and fills the sections for you to tidy up.

0_9_0.title: Custom sections
0_9_0.description: Add your own sections beyond the built-in set, either as a rich text block or a list of entries.

0_9_0.title: Reorder certifications
0_9_0.description: Drag certifications into the order you want, the same way skills and languages already work.

0_9_0.title: Hide proficiency
0_9_0.description: Turn the proficiency level off on skills and languages when you would rather just list them, with a toggle in each section.

0_9_0.title: Language columns
0_9_0.description: Show your languages in one column or two, matching the layout control already in Skills.

0_9_0.title: Undo a deletion
0_9_0.description: Deleting a resume now waits ten seconds and shows an Undo, so an accidental delete is easy to take back.

0_9_0.title: Duplicate a resume
0_9_0.description: Copy any resume from its menu to branch a new version without starting over.

0_8_0.title: Skills column layout
0_8_0.description: A toggle in the Skills section switches between one and two columns, and your choice carries through to the preview and every export.

0_8_0.title: Newest entries first
0_8_0.description: The editor lists your entries newest first, matching the order they appear in the preview, so the forms and your resume always line up.

0_8_0.title: New landing navbar
0_8_0.description: The landing page has a new navigation bar, with a menu that opens cleanly on mobile.

0_8_0.title: Page load progress
0_8_0.description: Moving between pages shows a slim progress bar at the top, so you get instant feedback while a page loads.

0_7_0.title: Internship section
0_7_0.description: List internships as their own entries, separate from full-time roles, with the same fields as Experience.

0_7_0.title: Projects section
0_7_0.description: Give side projects, open-source work, and anything you have shipped their own space, each with a name, link, dates, and description.

0_7_0.title: Blank resume preview
0_7_0.description: A blank resume shows a preview placeholder in your library instead of an empty white card, so a new resume looks intentional until you start writing.

0_6_0.title: Bahasa Indonesia
0_6_0.description: Switch the entire interface between English and Indonesian anytime with the language toggle in the navbar.

0_6_0.title: Per-resume language
0_6_0.description: Pick English or Indonesian per document, and the section headings and dates in your PDF, DOCX, and TXT exports follow that choice.

0_6_0.title: Reorder skills and languages
0_6_0.description: Grab the handle next to an entry and drag it into place, or use the keyboard to move it. The new order flows straight into the preview and every export.

0_6_0.title: Empty section prompts
0_6_0.description: Instead of a lone button, each section without entries shows a short prompt for what to add.

0_6_0.title: Refreshed hero gradient
0_6_0.description: The landing page hero heading has a new gradient, tuned for both light and dark mode.

0_5_0.title: Switch templates in the editor
0_5_0.description: The new Layout tab shows your resume rendered in every template, and one click applies your pick.

0_5_0.title: Start from a blank resume
0_5_0.description: Untick “Pre-fill with example content” in the create dialog to begin with a blank document instead of the example resume.

0_5_0.title: Emptyable sections
0_5_0.description: Every entry has a delete button, and removing the last one drops the section from the preview until you add another.

0_4_0.title: Organization section
0_4_0.description: Showcase volunteer, student, and community roles with dates and highlights, just like work experience. It shows up in every template and export, and existing resumes get it automatically.

0_4_0.title: Safer app updates
0_4_0.description: A backup copy is kept on your device before any data-format upgrade, and a resume the app cannot read yet is flagged with a notice instead of disappearing.

0_4_0.title: Guided tour
0_4_0.description: A guided tour walks you through the dashboard, the templates, and the editor on your first visit.

0_4_0.title: Landing page walkthrough
0_4_0.description: The landing page walks through how Lanjut works, ending with a one-click way to start a new resume.

0_4_0.title: Report bugs and requests
0_4_0.description: Report a bug or feature request from the sidebar; we prefill the GitHub issue for you.

0_4_0.title: Mobile drawers
0_4_0.description: On your phone, dialogs open as drawers that are easier to reach and swipe away.

0_3_0.title: Template browser
0_3_0.description: Browse templates on their own page, with search and sorting.

0_3_0.title: Five new templates
0_3_0.description: Ketat, Luasa, Tebal, Klasik, and Ketik.

0_3_0.title: Live thumbnails
0_3_0.description: Template and resume cards show a live thumbnail of your actual document.

0_3_0.title: Sidebar and quick actions
0_3_0.description: The sidebar highlights where you are, and each resume gets a quick actions menu.

0_2_0.title: Export your resume
0_2_0.description: Save your resume as PDF, DOCX, or plain text.

0_2_0.title: Rich text in the preview
0_2_0.description: Bold, italics, links, and lists show up in the live preview.

0_2_0.title: Full editor sections
0_2_0.description: The editor covers summary, experience, education, skills, certifications, and languages.

download.title: Download resume
download.description: Pick a format and name your file.

sidebar.noResumeDescription: When you add resume, they will be visible here.

emptyState.title: No resumes yet
emptyState.description: Nothing is saved on this device yet. Start from a template, or create a blank resume.

unreadable.title: Some resumes need a newer version of the app
unreadable.description: {count, plural, one {# resume was} other {# resumes were}} saved by a newer version of Lanjut than the one this tab is running. They are still stored safely on this device. Refresh the page to update the app and see them again.

grid.errorDescription: Nothing was deleted. The library just failed to load from this browser's storage. Refresh the page to try again.

descriptions.awal: A clean, single-column ATS-safe starter. Linear reading order, no columns or tables, with room for every section.
descriptions.ketat: A compact serif classic: centered ruled section headings, right-aligned contact column, and italic dates. Dense without feeling cramped.
descriptions.luasa: An airy minimalist layout: letterspaced headings, a single contact line, and slim accent bars. Generous whitespace throughout.
descriptions.tebal: A bold, modern statement: oversized name, heavy uppercase headings over thick rules, and strong typographic hierarchy.
descriptions.klasik: A traditional all-serif CV: centered name and contacts, quiet centered headings, and italic dates. Timeless and formal.
descriptions.ketik: A typewriter-flavored technical look: monospace name, headings, and dates over a clean sans body. Built for developers.

validation.titleMax: Keep it to {max} characters or fewer.
validation.featureProblem: Describe the problem this would solve.

direct.name: Your name
direct.nameDescription: Shown on the public GitHub issue so we know who it's from.
direct.githubAlt: Have a GitHub account? Open a prefilled issue instead.
direct.sentToast: Sent! Thank you; we filed the GitHub issue for you.
direct.errorToast: Couldn't send it. Try again, or use the GitHub button.

create.title: Create a new resume
create.description: Name it, choose where to start, and pick a template.
create.label: Resume name

rename.title: Rename
rename.description: You can rename this resume label to whatever you want. If the value of the label is same as before, it won't be saved.
rename.label: Resume label
rename.fieldDescription: At least 3 characters or up. Max 100 characters.

delete.title: Delete {title}?
delete.description: This will delete {title}. You'll have a few seconds to undo. Are you sure?

download.title: Download {title}
download.description: Pick a format and name your file. The export is generated in your browser.
download.missing: This resume could not be loaded from this browser's storage.
download.drawerDescription: Pick a format and name your file.

bug.title: Report a bug
bug.description: Send it right here and we'll file the GitHub issue for you; no account needed. If you have a GitHub account, you can open a prefilled issue yourself instead.
bug.descriptionGitHubOnly: This opens a prefilled GitHub issue for you to review and submit; a GitHub account is required, and your browser details are filled in for you.
bug.whatHappenedPlaceholder: The editor preview goes blank when...
bug.whatHappenedDescription: Include the steps to reproduce it; a numbered list works great.
bug.area: Where does the bug show up?

feature.title: Request a feature
feature.description: Send it right here and we'll file the GitHub issue for you; no account needed. Note that resume structure (tables, columns, images) is out of scope by design; presentation is fair game.
feature.descriptionGitHubOnly: This opens a prefilled GitHub issue for you to review and submit; a GitHub account is required. Note that resume structure (tables, columns, images) is out of scope by design; presentation is fair game.
feature.problemPlaceholder: When I tailor my resume for different roles, I have to...
feature.problemDescription: Describe the situation where you needed this, rather than the solution itself.

import.dropPrompt: Drop a PDF, JSON, or YAML file here, or click to browse
import.hint: Your file is read on your device and never uploaded.
import.errorUnsupported: Only PDF, JSON, and YAML files are supported.
import.errorTooLarge: That file is too large. The limit is 10 MB.
import.errorEmpty: This PDF has no readable text. It looks scanned; try exporting a text-based PDF.
import.errorEncrypted: This PDF is password-protected. Remove the password and try again.
import.errorGeneric: We couldn't read this PDF. Try a different file.
import.disclaimer: Importing is best-effort and can miss or misplace details. If something comes out wrong, it would really help if you
import.errorInvalidData: This file isn't a valid resume export.

chrome.notExist: This resume doesn't exist in this browser's storage.

personal.contactInfoDesc: So HR can reach you easily

summary.label: Professional Summary
summary.placeholder: I'm a passionate UX engineer. Creating visually engaging...

experience.emptyDescription: Add your roles to build out your work history.

internship.emptyDescription: Add internships to show early hands-on experience.

projects.legendDesc: Show off the things you've built
projects.emptyDescription: Add side projects, open-source work, or things you've shipped.
projects.name: Project name
projects.summaryPlaceholder: What it does, what you built, the impact....

organizations.legendDesc: Describe your volunteer, student, and community roles
organizations.emptyDescription: Add volunteer, student, or community roles here.

education.emptyDescription: Add your degrees, schools, and courses.

certifications.emptyDescription: Add licenses and certifications you've earned.
certifications.name: Name
certifications.urlDesc: Link to the certificate or the issuer's site.

skills.emptyDescription: Add the tools and technologies you work with.

languages.emptyDescription: Add the languages you speak and your proficiency.

custom.addDescription: Name your new section. You can rename it later.
custom.renameDescription: Give this section a new name.
custom.emptyDescription: Add an entry to fill in this section.

leftovers.title: Text we couldn't place
leftovers.description: The import couldn't fit these into a section. Copy anything worth keeping, then dismiss.

document.importHint: Bring in details from an existing PDF resume, or restore a JSON or YAML export. It's read on your device and never uploaded.
document.replacePrompt: This resume already has content. Replace it, or keep it and create a new one?
document.copyHint: Copy this resume to the clipboard as structured text. Rich text travels as simple markdown, and pasting it into an import restores it exactly.
